items.name: Eye of The Gods
items.description:
This item is not free!

High above in the boundless heavens, there exists a godly being whose wisdom transcends time, holding within its gaze the infinite tapestry of creation. With every vision, it sees not only the stars but the countless threads of destiny that weave together the past, present, and future, guiding all with an unfathomable grace.

Thanks to everybody that bought this item!
